items.title: Tim Cook says RAM expenses are ‘unsustainable’ and Apple is going to raise prices
items.description: Apple is planning to raise prices in response to the ongoing memory shortage. items.title: VSCO launches Studio Pro mobile photo editing app and plans $500 per year subscription
items.description: VSCO is taking on Adobe with a new Studio Pro editing app rolling out today on iOS and coming to macOS later this year, as Bloomberg reports. At launch, the app offers tools for batch editing, style matching from a reference image, and sharing images through VSCO Galleries. VSCO says more features a...

items.title: Epic wants to let you bring your Fortnite skins to other games
items.description: Epic Games has been touting the potential of an interoperable metaverse for years, though that vision hasn't yet become a reality. items.title: Two-thirds of Americans think AI is advancing too quickly
items.description: According to the latest Pew Research poll, 49 percent of Americans report using chatbots at least occasionally, but 63 percent think the tech is advancing too quickly. Overall, use of AI chatbots has increased dramatically since 2024, when only 33 percent reported using them. Specifically, ChatGPT's...

items.title: We got free GTA V upgrades before GTA VI
items.description: Rockstar Games will allow players to upgrade older versions of Grand Theft Auto V for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X / S for free just months before the launch of GTA VI.
